testcase.name: test_load_data_cache_write_failure_raises
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:459 统一基础设施集成层不可用，使用标准logging WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:495 使用降级基础设施服务 WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:516 降级缓存初始化失败: No module named 'src.data.core.cache' INFO data_registry:registry.py:36 DataRegistry initialized INFO disk_cache:disk_cache.py:76 DiskCache initialized with cache_dir: cache INFO data_manager:data_manager.py:245 使用降级缓存管理器 WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:847 StockDataLoader not available WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:853 IndexDataLoader not available WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:860 NewsDataLoader not available WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:867 FinancialDataLoader not available INFO data_manager:data_manager.py:578 核心服务注册完成 INFO data_manager:data_manager.py:269 DataManager initialized successfully WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:931 Quality monitoring failed: qm-err ERROR data_manager:data_manager.py:949 Failed to cache data: cache-set-error ERROR root:exceptions.py:33 基础设施异常: DATA_LOADER_ERROR - Cache write failed: cache-set-error ERROR data_manager:data_manager.py:959 Failed to load data: Cache write failed: cache-set-error ERROR root:exceptions.py:33 基础设施异常: DATA_LOADER_ERROR - Data loading failed: Cache write failed: cache-set-error INFO data_manager:data_manager.py:1258 DataManager shutdown completed --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------
testcase.system-err: --------------------------------- Captured Err --------------------------------- WARNING:data_manager:统一基础设施集成层不可用，使用标准logging WARNING:data_manager:使用降级基础设施服务 WARNING:data_manager:降级缓存初始化失败: No module named 'src.data.core.cache' INFO:data_registry:DataRegistry initialized 2025-11-16 14:39:46,108 - disk_cache - INFO - DiskCache initialized with cache_dir: cache INFO:disk_cache:DiskCache initialized with cache_dir: cache INFO:data_manager:使用降级缓存管理器 WARNING:data_manager:StockDataLoader not available WARNING:data_manager:IndexDataLoader not available WARNING:data_manager:NewsDataLoader not available WARNING:data_manager:FinancialDataLoader not available INFO:data_manager:核心服务注册完成 INFO:data_manager:DataManager initialized successfully WARNING:data_manager:Quality monitoring failed: qm-err ERROR:data_manager:Failed to cache data: cache-set-error ERROR:root:基础设施异常: DATA_LOADER_ERROR - Cache write failed: cache-set-error ERROR:data_manager:Failed to load data: Cache write failed: cache-set-error ERROR:root:基础设施异常: DATA_LOADER_ERROR - Data loading failed: Cache write failed: cache-set-error INFO:data_manager:DataManager shutdown completed

testcase.name: test_file_loader_json_roundtrip_success
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- INFO FileDataLoader:data_loader.py:164 成功保存数据: C:\Users\AILeo\AppData\Local\Temp\tmpyrvfrvrs.json, 行数: 2 INFO FileDataLoader:data_loader.py:121 成功加载数据: C:\Users\AILeo\AppData\Local\Temp\tmpyrvfrvrs.json, 行数: 2 --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------
testcase.system-err: --------------------------------- Captured Err --------------------------------- INFO:FileDataLoader:成功保存数据: C:\Users\AILeo\AppData\Local\Temp\tmpyrvfrvrs.json, 行数: 2 INFO:FileDataLoader:成功加载数据: C:\Users\AILeo\AppData\Local\Temp\tmpyrvfrvrs.json, 行数: 2

testcase.name: test_load_multi_source_aggregates_errors
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:459 统一基础设施集成层不可用，使用标准logging WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:495 使用降级基础设施服务 WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:516 降级缓存初始化失败: No module named 'src.data.core.cache' INFO data_registry:registry.py:36 DataRegistry initialized INFO disk_cache:disk_cache.py:76 DiskCache initialized with cache_dir: cache INFO data_manager:data_manager.py:245 使用降级缓存管理器 WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:847 StockDataLoader not available WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:853 IndexDataLoader not available WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:860 NewsDataLoader not available WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:867 FinancialDataLoader not available INFO data_manager:data_manager.py:578 核心服务注册完成 INFO data_manager:data_manager.py:269 DataManager initialized successfully WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:931 Quality monitoring failed: qm-err INFO data_manager:data_manager.py:955 Data loaded successfully: stock ERROR data_manager:data_manager.py:994 Failed to load index data: index-fail ERROR root:exceptions.py:33 基础设施异常: DATA_LOADER_ERROR - Multi - source data loading failed: index-fail ERROR data_manager:data_manager.py:998 Multi - source data loading failed: Multi - source data loading failed: index-fail ERROR root:exceptions.py:33 基础设施异常: DATA_LOADER_ERROR - Multi - source data loading failed: Multi - source data loading failed: index-fail INFO data_manager:data_manager.py:1258 DataManager shutdown completed --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------
testcase.system-err: --------------------------------- Captured Err --------------------------------- WARNING:data_manager:统一基础设施集成层不可用，使用标准logging WARNING:data_manager:使用降级基础设施服务 WARNING:data_manager:降级缓存初始化失败: No module named 'src.data.core.cache' INFO:data_registry:DataRegistry initialized 2025-11-16 14:39:46,223 - disk_cache - INFO - DiskCache initialized with cache_dir: cache INFO:disk_cache:DiskCache initialized with cache_dir: cache INFO:data_manager:使用降级缓存管理器 WARNING:data_manager:StockDataLoader not available WARNING:data_manager:IndexDataLoader not available WARNING:data_manager:NewsDataLoader not available WARNING:data_manager:FinancialDataLoader not available INFO:data_manager:核心服务注册完成 INFO:data_manager:DataManager initialized successfully WARNING:data_manager:Quality monitoring failed: qm-err INFO:data_manager:Data loaded successfully: stock ERROR:data_manager:Failed to load index data: index-fail ERROR:root:基础设施异常: DATA_LOADER_ERROR - Multi - source data loading failed: index-fail ERROR:data_manager:Multi - source data loading failed: Multi - source data loading failed: index-fail ERROR:root:基础设施异常: DATA_LOADER_ERROR - Multi - source data loading failed: Multi - source data loading failed: index-fail INFO:data_manager:DataManager shutdown completed
